exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class ClientRecord:
    client_id: str
    full_name: str
    phones: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)

print(ClientRecord('C001', 'Ana', ['999']))

from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Transaction:
    tx_id: str
    client_id: str
    amount: float
    currency: str

print(Transaction('T1', 'C001', 10.0, 'PEN'))

print('INV: ClientRecord.client_id y document_id no vacíos')
print('INV: Transaction.amount > 0')
print('INV: RelationshipEvidence.signal_score en [0,1]')
print('INV: ResolvedEntity.entity_id estable y no vacío')

print('BUG: mutar campos de key tras insertar en dict rompe lookup')
print('SAFE: frozen dataclass como key; no mutar tras insert')

from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class CaseFile:
    case_id: str
    evidences: list = field(default_factory=list)

    def add_evidence(self, ev):
        self.evidences.append(ev)

cf = CaseFile('K1')
cf.add_evidence({'s': 0.1})
cf.add_evidence({'s': 0.2})
print('n=', len(cf.evidences))

print('JUST: Client y Person evolucionan roles distintos; herencia acopla de más')
print('JUST: composición permite reutilizar PersonInfo sin jerarquía frágil')

print('WHEN_NOT: una sola implementación y sin tests de puerto')
print('WHEN_NOT: YAGNI — no hay fake ni segundo adapter planeado')

print('LAYER: cli (I/O argparse)')
print('LAYER: service (orquesta)')
print('LAYER: domain/repo (puro)')

print('ANTES: BadClient.decide_fraud(score) emite veredicto')
print('DESPUÉS: RelationshipEvidence.signal_score es dato; sin decide_fraud')

exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class ClientRecord:
    client_id: str
    full_name: str
    phones: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)

print(ClientRecord('C001', 'Ana Perez', ['999']))

from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Transaction:
    tx_id: str
    client_id: str
    amount: float
    currency: str

print(Transaction('T1', 'C001', 10.0, 'PEN'))

print('INV: ClientRecord document_id no vacío')
print('INV: Transaction amount > 0')
print('INV: RelationshipEvidence signal_score en [0,1]')
print('INV: ResolvedEntity entity_id no vacío')

print('BUG: entidad mutable como key de dict — mutar campo de eq rompe lookup')
print('SAFE: frozen=True / key por document_id inmutable')

from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class CaseFile:
    case_id: str
    evidences: list = field(default_factory=list)

    def add_evidence(self, ev):
        self.evidences.append(ev)

cf = CaseFile('CASE1')
cf.add_evidence({'s': 0.1})
cf.add_evidence({'s': 0.2})
print('n=', len(cf.evidences))

print('JUST: Client y Person no son siempre is-a; roles evolucionan distinto')
print('JUST: composición evita jerarquías frágiles')

print('WHEN_NOT: una sola implementación sin tests de puerto (YAGNI)')
print('WHEN_NOT: Protocol por si acaso sin segundo adapter real')

print('LAYER: cli (argparse/I/O)')
print('LAYER: service (orquesta)')
print('LAYER: domain/repo (entidades + persistencia)')

print('ANTES: BadClient.decide_fraud(score) emite veredicto')
print('DESPUÉS: RelationshipEvidence.signal_score es dato; sin is_fraud/is_related_family')
